I don’t mind the frugality I rather admire it tbh and skipping story is normal for most of the veteran

There's the frugality and then there's a single chair for furniture
I dunno why......but everything but the chicken looks good there
That's why it doesn't look like good chicken
I mean I did try to just use a plastic bag as my drawers when we move house
Faster than lightning and insists on buying an actual drawer
Do you people not care about comfiness and such <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
Well if u really wanna be pedantic about it I am homeless rn so
I just live in my parents home
Not when you are called a college student
I was living with my parents at your age too
Moved out like half a year ago
Well technically I don’t own a house
If u really wanna get technical

Please assist with the child homelessness crisis.
They need your help to buy homes...
I dont see people renting apartments calling themselfs homeless 💣
im with tea on this one
The problem is the banking system. They don't wanna provide $200,000 down payment loans to 8 year olds for some reason....
But having a mother who spend like money is water do things to u
It was born out of trying to be considerate and save my parents money
So I guess I am just naturally weird
<@157679037240573953> u have a new buddy can i join?
Also it might be a cultural thing depends on where you live...and the eventually expectation is you'll help take care of them once they slow down.
Now that I think about it the bed frame isn’t really that necessary
Just the mat thing whatever u call it
wait i dont know how to explain in english
My grandma just put the mattress down on floor
Just mattresses aren't meant to work like that.
If you wanty to go no frame, do the Japanese style
I have slept on the floor multiple times, its not that bad
Plus I already got a functional bed rn
and depending on how it's set up can be better for your back
Yes with a frame and everything u guys can rejoice

btw most people i know, who grew in normal families, feels this way once they understand how money works. So i learn if they spend in me the best thing i can do is treat them well and be grateful towards them
100% and now that u mention it i think most frugal people who isn’t doing it out of necessity tend to be frugal on most things
But spend very easily on things they like
An example: me with food, books and sometime Gacha. Monchi? Spend just enough so that his place is functional but become whale 🐳 when spending is on morimens/gacha games
But then again I just have a sample size of 2 people so who knows?
I am very gluttony when its about food so I try to waste the least possible

cuz i forgot there was a knife
